programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing With the Devil

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: The Loud House: Schooled!

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: The Highway Is the Lifeline
programme.desc: Herb's team fights fire wile dealing with a burned-out semi. Mark fights his way through a long back-up during a whiteout to reach a job. A unique recovery crew is up against a load of peat moss and trailer.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: A Real Disaster

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: I've Seen My Share

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: A Moment's Notice

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Immovable Objects

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Nervous Wreck

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Rear View

programme.title: Weird Earth: Mist Domes and Square Waves

programme.title: Weird Earth: Fire Worms and Green Clouds

programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 5
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 6
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Heckle and Hide

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Starfart Macchiato
programme.desc: Find out what game the Jokers have played five times throughout the show's history, and how the crew got poison ivy. Plus, learn what game the Jokers played that had them asking for extra turns.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 13

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Store-Bought is Fine

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Bringing The Outdoors In
programme.desc: Valerie combines cuisine with camping for a festive picnic.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 15
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making quick family meals at home on the ranch. There's Pork Marsala with Mushrooms and a gorgeous Grilled Shrimp Panzanella. Plus, Ree makes Spinach Artichoke Calzones and shortcut Creamy Tortellini Soup, a real 10-minute wonder.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Four In Hand
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has portable food in hand with four fantastic on-the-go ideas. There's breakfast bagel burgers that are the perfect start to the day for a teenage cowboy. Taco chicken Caesar salad wraps are a great on-the-go meal.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything Wildcard
programme.desc: Ree Drummond answers wildcard questions from friends, townsfolk and visitors to Pawhuska. She shares an over-the-top good seared rib eye Banh Mi Vietnamese sandwich and an awesome chicken quinoa bowl with roasted corn salsa.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Freezer Food: Tex-Mex
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking Tex-Mex marvels and filling the freezer with her family's favorites. She makes a big pot of green chile pork stew and a batch of fiesta mac and cheese.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Appetizer Perfection
programme.desc: Molly is sharing her favourite appetizer recipes, starting with BBQ pulled pork nachos. She also makes gooey fried mozzarella sticks, ham and cheese jalapeno poppers with a spicy kick and flaky walleye cakes.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: All About Family
programme.desc: Family and traditions mean a lot to Trisha, who shares her favoruite family recipes handed down over generations. The recipes include old-fashioned potato-beef casserole and Brunswick stew as well as a coconut cloud cake.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Beat the Heat
programme.desc: The Kitchen shares fun, cool recipes for the hottest days of summer. The refreshing dishes include Easy Roasted Green Gazpacho, Strawberry Balsamic BLT and Grilled Swordfish with Mango Salsa. Plus, Watermelon Granita Parfait is the perfect summer dessert.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Labor Day BBQ
programme.desc: The Kitchen caps off summer with the greatest recipes for a Labor Day BBQ. Geoffrey Zakarian starts with tips for making his pork roast sandwiches with spicy apricot mustard and Jeff Mauro highlights the last of a seasonal favourite.

programme.desc: Officers Murphy and Demler investigate a suspicious turkey kill while Officer Courtney rescues a scared fawn near a busy intersection. Officer Lucas races to save a sick loon and Officer Fluette helps a hiker find his father who is lost in the woods.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Blindsided
programme.desc: Officer Hannett is tested trying to capture an injured goose. Officer Lucas is the first responder on scene for a drug overdose. And Officer MacFadzen must climb 40 feet into the treetops to deal with an aggressive hawk.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Under Suspicion
programme.desc: Officers Hannett and Boudreau interrogate a group about lighting a fire in the woods. Officers Cheney and McKee confront a sly fisherman with a habit of lying. And officers discover a lobsterman who is banned from state waters breaking the law.

programme.desc: Officer Kevin Bronson races to get a driver under the influence off the road. Officer Eric Hannett catches two teenagers joyriding an ATV on a public road. Up north, Officer Bob Mancini helps evacuate an injured hiker.

programme.desc: It's opening weekend of deer season and the wardens head out around the state to ensure everyone plays by the rules. In East Texas, an injured owl is rushed to the vet. On the Gulf, Game Wardens get tough when an oysterman's catch doesn't add up.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Reunion Part 2
programme.desc: The ladies rehash their trips to the Hamptons, Newport, Mexico and all the drama in between. Ramona addresses Leah's behaviour and tempers flare when she claims Leah ruined her birthday party with her risqué dance moves.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Top 20 Reunion Moments

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Tastes like Trouble
programme.desc: Cynthia's peaceful divorce takes a turn when Peter starts talking about their relationship to the press. While Kenya hopes to reconcile her differences with Matt, Porsha decides she is ready to buy her first home.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Model Behavior
programme.desc: Phaedra calls Kandi to clear the air, but the conversation takes a turn as Kandi divulges long-held secrets. Shereé acts as momager to son Kairo, as he explores a modelling career. Porsha introduces Todd to the family and he reveals something unexpected.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Bosom Buddies
programme.desc: The juicy details surrounding Kandi and Phaedra's disastrous lunch begin to spread like wildfire, leaving Porsha on a mission to defend Phaedra from the allegations.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Char-lotta Drama
programme.desc: Kenya is invited to host Peter's grand opening of Club One in Charlotte, but Cynthia is disappointed to discover she was not invited to join the celebration. Meanwhile, Kandi feels betrayed by a former employee while gearing up for her convention.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Uncharitable Behavior
programme.desc: Kenya returns from Charlotte to discover 'Moore Manor' has been vandalized once again by her estranged boyfriend Matt. Phaedra gives Kenya legal advice, and in the process reveals shocking secrets about her marriage. Cynthia and Noelle move out.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Thelma and Louise Take Flint
programme.desc: Phaedra and Kenya rekindle their friendship as they travel to Flint, Michigan, to participate in Phaedra's summer camp. Back in Atlanta, Cynthia makes herself at home at Kandi's house.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Into the Woods
programme.desc: Despite Porsha's recent outburst, Phaedra and Kenya want to move forward with their plans for a 'glamping' trip, hoping for a weekend of bonding and unity. Meanwhile, Porsha's feelings about Phaedra's loyalty are tested.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: If These Woods Could Talk
programme.desc: The ladies finally reach the woods of Georgia for a fabulous weekend of 'glamping,' but are shocked to learn that they'll be spending their first night sleeping in tents. Later, Marlo confronts Kenya over unresolved issues, leading to an argument.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Loose Lips Sink Ships
programme.desc: The ladies return to Atlanta after a dramatic end to their glamping getaway. Cynthia begins planning her Cargo fashion show, presenting momager Shereé with an opportunity for Kairo to participate. Porsha confronts Todd with an ultimatum.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Lei It All on the Table
programme.desc: The tea overfloweth when Kandi relays Porsha's accusations to Cynthia, Shereé, Kenya and Shamea, all while Porsha spills the details to her sister. Kenya gets a surprise visit from her brother and his kids.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Maui Mayhem
programme.desc: Extinguishing all hope of a peaceful getaway, the group's first dinner in Maui escalates to new heights as Kandi and Porsha erupt over who’s to blame for the salacious rumours that have surfaced. Kandi plans a speed boat adventure without Porsha.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Aloha and Goodbye
programme.desc: After Phaedra’s attempt to reunite the group fails, Kandi and Todd decide to bring everyone together for a roast of Peter. Shereé is forced to decide if she should move forward with or without Bob.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Baby Nups and Breakups
programme.desc: After enjoying their time in the sun, the ladies are back home and ready to get down to business. Cynthia shows the Atlanta fashionistas that she's more than a pretty face, even as Momager Shereé tries to interfere.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Shamans
programme.desc: Throughout history, spiritual leaders known as shamans have healed, protected and advised their people. Whether they are simply putting on elaborate ceremonies or are in contact with extraterrestrial realms is investigated.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Other Earth
programme.desc: Billions of dollars have been spent in our quest to find an 'other Earth.' Since the launch of the Kepler Telescope in 2009, scientists have identified thousands of planets capable of supporting life. This could support that theory that we aren't alone.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Russia Declassified
programme.desc: Learn about a secret alliance hidden in plain sight and joint space missions with undisclosed agendas.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Pyramids of Antarctica
programme.desc: Antarctica is Earth's most remote continent - but satellite imagery has revealed what appear to be the tops of man-made pyramids. Alien Astronaut theorists suggest that an ice-free Antarctica may have been colonized by extraterrestrials in the past.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The World Before Time
programme.desc: Shocking new evidence reveals that advanced civilizations might have existed on Earth tens of thousands of years ago.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: They Came From the Sea
programme.desc: Lurking in our oceans are creatures that defy explanation. Octopuses can edit their own DNA, animals are able to regenerate their entire brains, and jellyfish can literally live forever. Learn is they were delivered to Earth by extraterrestrials.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Mayan Conspiracy
programme.desc: The Mayan civilization dominated Central America for nearly 2000 years, but by the 9th century A.D, the Mayan people had vanished. Some experts think aliens may have had something to do with the Mayan mystery.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Danny's Dream, Kevin's Nightmare
programme.desc: Danny has wanted a Plymouth Roadrunner ever since a couple of car nuts pulled him over a few years ago and bought his Sebring on the spot. He's finally found one and he's doing it up exactly as he wants to. Meanwhile, Horny Mike takes on a project.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Harley and the Mystery Merc
programme.desc: Danny makes a plan to put the Count's Kustoms touch on a classic Harley Davidson that he hopes to sell for a big profit. But when the bike reaches Horny Mike the whole project is put in jeopardy.

programme.title: American Wreckers: Belle Hath No Fury

programme.title: American Wreckers: The Showdown State
programme.desc: After five weeks of punishing hits and tough crashes, it's all come down to one last derby. This is the Outsiders' last chance to save face after another dominate performance by the Belle Boys. The teams leave it all on the course, with a shocking result.

programme.desc: Mike climbs over a wall of chairs to uncover a stash of Art Deco cigarette machines. Back in Iowa, an appraiser is awestruck by a recent find, and Mike's coveted 1911 Harley is finally ready for its first test drive.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Desserted/ The Gifted
programme.desc: Cricket treats his family to dinner, but Bill is suspicious about how he plans to pay for it. Tilly and Cricket battle to see if Bill lies about liking their Father's Day gifts.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Friend Con/ Flimflammed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler and Bill hit it off and become friends at Farm Con. Cricket stumbles into having one hundred dollars and immediately buys into a pyramid scheme.

programme.desc: Cricket struggles to get the best birthday present for his best friend, Remy. After almost getting in a dirt bike accident, Cricket decides to live his life in shelter.

programme.title: Movie: Hotel Transylvania 3: Summer Vacation
programme.desc: A stressed-out Count Dracula is talked into taking his family on a cruise vacation, and he and the ship's captain find themselves attracted to each other and begin dating, but Dracula's daughter Mavis doesn't trust her dad's new love interest.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Quiet Please/ Chipwrecked
programme.desc: When the Greens visit the library, the librarian threatens to throw them out if they make a sound. Chip Whistler attempts to make Cricket lose his job by running Big Coffee out of business.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Sleepover to End All Sleepovers/ A Day at the Aquarium
programme.desc: Anne and Marcy issue a Scare Dare challenge that brings Sprig and Polly into forbidden areas of the castle. Anne and the Plantars look to spend what could be their last day together at the Newtopia Aquarium.

programme.title: Amphibia: Little Frogtown/ Hopping Mall
programme.desc: Hop Pop investigates the disappearance of an old friend and the shadowy crime syndicate he suspects are behind it. Hop Pop takes the kids to a Newtopian shopping mall to buy souvenirs, and Anne will do anything to get the perfect gift for her mom.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Style/ I, Farmbot
programme.desc: When Tilly is mistaken for a baby, she searches the mall for a new look to reflect her maturity. Cricket persuades Bill to buy a farming robot in order to get out of chores.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Quiet Please/ Chipwrecked
programme.desc: When the Greens visit the library, the librarian threatens to throw them out if they make a sound. Chip Whistler attempts to make Cricket lose his job by running Big Coffee out of business.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Sleepover to End All Sleepovers/ A Day at the Aquarium
programme.desc: Anne and Marcy issue a Scare Dare challenge that brings Sprig and Polly into forbidden areas of the castle. Anne and the Plantars look to spend what could be their last day together at the Newtopia Aquarium.

programme.title: Jessie: Teacher's Pest
programme.desc: When Zuri is having problems with a teacher at school, Jessie decides to volunteer in Zuri's classroom so she can assess the situation. Because Jessie has always been the teacher’s pet, she figures the teacher will love her but this isn't the case.

programme.title: Jessie: To Be Me or Not to Be Me
programme.desc: Jessie gets her first big acting part in a Shakespeare production in the park. When Jessie and Zuri switch personalities, that leaves an eight-year-old trying to pull off Jessie's performance and keep from ruining it for her.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Bride and Doom
programme.desc: The campers learn about Olga, the daughter of the camp founder whose ghost supposedly haunts Kikiwaka. A camp wedding may be the only way to rid the camp of the ghost.

programme.desc: When Nia sneaks to school wearing makeup against Raven's wishes, she draws the attention of the 8th grade girls who invite her to hang out.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Fears of a Clown
programme.desc: Booker and Levi battle with Nia and Tess for the attention of a cool new kid in the building.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Choose-A-Rooney

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Friend-A-Rooney

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Albums and Auditions
programme.desc: Ally gets accepted to a music school and is so excited that Austin, Dez and Trish sent in an application on her behalf. Unknown to them, the school is in New York, forcing Ally to decide if she wants to move and leave her friends behind.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Everglades and Allygators
programme.desc: The gang heads to Shiny Money's houseboat, and, while Austin and Ally are working on a song, Trish and Dez accidentally lure in a legendary alligator. Chaos quickly ensues as they try to keep the houseboat and their summer vacation afloat.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gabriella's Fella/ Cheap Show

programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: The Owl House: Wing It Like Witches

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Robostus
programme.desc: A small, sensitive robot named Markov gets akumatized into Robostus, a villain who can bring inanimate objects to life.

programme.desc: A figure skating trainer named Philippe gets akumatized into Frozer. Armed with evil ice skates, he wants to turn Paris into a Kingdom of Ice.

programme.desc: Zuri must find a way to get back a cherished toy that Jessie passed on to her after she trades it to a toy collector. Meanwhile, Luke and Emma work together to teach Bertram Salsa dancing so he can compete in a dance contest to win his crush's heart.

programme.title: Jessie: Punch Dumped Love
programme.desc: Jessie grounds Emma from going to the school dance. Emma must sneak out to warn Luke his crush is dumping him. Adam Sandler, guest starring as himself, offers Luke some relationship advice at the dance.

programme.desc: Jessie and Tony’s first anniversary is coming up, and Jessie’s gift to Tony is writing a song about how much he means to her, but she can’t find the right words to express how much he means to her.

programme.desc: The counselors clean out the storage and find a fortune teller machine. They pull it out and it reads something important will go missing and a sister will betray another sister.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Game of Totems

programme.desc: Death hits close to home when a Mississippi father of four is brutally killed on his own front porch. Soon a mother and son turn against one another as detectives work to untangle a murky tale of "he said she said" to close in on a killer.

programme.title: License to Kill: Death by Miracle Cure
programme.desc: Detectives in Colorado investigate a Naturopathic Doctor after two of his patients develop horrific side effects from dubious miracle treatments. What they uncover is a deadly history of fraud and barbaric, invasive medical treatments.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Knock at the Door
programme.desc: Tara Ord was a beautiful young woman with big dreams. Then suddenly she vanished. With little evidence to go on, it would take years for determined cold case detectives to uncover the long buried clue that blew this case wide open.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets on Hot Springs Drive
programme.desc: A woman is murdered in a home invasion. Then, her best friend and neighbor is shot the following night. Investigators unearth disturbing secrets that suggest the cases may be linked.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Promise
programme.desc: When Cathy Torrez never came home after work, her family feared the worst. An intensive search ended after her car was found, with her body in the trunk. It take years to get to the truth.

programme.title: License to Kill: Death by Miracle Cure
programme.desc: Detectives in Colorado investigate a Naturopathic Doctor after two of his patients develop horrific side effects from dubious miracle treatments. What they uncover is a deadly history of fraud and barbaric, invasive medical treatments.

programme.title: Snapped: Sylvia White
programme.desc: When a prominent insurance salesman is gunned down on a country road in Kinston, North Carolina, a 20-year-old secret comes to light and casts a shadow on a killer's flawless reputation.

programme.title: Snapped: Blanche Taylor Moore
programme.desc: When a small town preacher is hospitalized with a mysterious illness, North Carolina police uncover a string of suspicious deaths all centered around a Burlington woman with a hidden dark side.

programme.title: Dateline: The Halloween Party

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Swept Away
programme.desc: A young man from small town Indiana heads to Japan where he falls for a beautiful woman from a land nearly as far away. Then, one of the biggest natural disasters in history hits.

programme.title: Snapped: Sarah Vercauteren

programme.title: The Simpsons: Girly Edition

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer to the Max
programme.desc: When a goofball character is named Homer Simpson, Homer changes his name to Max Power.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pygmoelian
programme.desc: After undergoing plastic surgery, Moe lands a role in the soap opera 'It Never Ends.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: Behind the Laughter
programme.desc: A look at the backstage life of the Simpsons, with testimonials from Springfield citizens.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Day of the Jackanapes
programme.desc: After training Bart to do away with Krusty for good, Sideshow Bob has a change of heart.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Ten-Per-Cent Solution
programme.desc: Krusty the Clown gets stuck in a rut when the television network pulls his show and his talent agency drops him. When the Simpsons introduce him to an agent, they're surprised to learn she was Krusty's first-ever agent.

programme.title: Africa: Congo
programme.desc: The Congo rainforest covers the very heart of Africa and is a dynamic and pulsating habitat, packed with life. From the competitive centre of the forest to the open edge of the Atlantic Ocena, this is all about carving out space in a crowded world.

programme.title: Africa: Cape
programme.desc: Two great ocean currents, one cold and one warm, sweep around the continent's Great Cape.

programme.title: Africa: Sahara
programme.desc: North Africa is home to the greatest desert on Earth, the Sahara. This vast wilderness is the toughest part of the African continent.

programme.title: Animal Babies: Water Babies
programme.desc: Many animals that live in water come on land to have their babies, and being born this way presents some major challenges for water babies to overcome.

programme.title: Africa: Kalahari
programme.desc: In Africa's ancient southwest corner, two deserts sit side by side; water is in short supply, yet these deserts are full of life because the creatures that live there have turned the rules of survival on their head.

programme.title: Africa: Savannah
programme.desc: East Africa is a land that is constantly changing. In order to survive, creatures must be able to deal with twists and turns, no matter how hostile and unpredictable. This unique and varied land is a haven for life.

programme.title: Africa: Congo
programme.desc: The Congo rainforest covers the very heart of Africa and is a dynamic and pulsating habitat, packed with life. From the competitive centre of the forest to the open edge of the Atlantic Ocena, this is all about carving out space in a crowded world.

programme.title: Animal Babies: Water Babies

programme.title: Africa: The Future
programme.desc: With more than a billion people, Africa remains home to many of the world's largest animals.

programme.title: Planet Earth: The Making of Africa
programme.desc: Africa is the world's last great wilderness and has drawn wildlife filmmakers for over a century. In the four years it took to make the series, the challenge for the 'Africa' team was to find new stories that no one had seen before.

programme.title: Wild West: Desert Heartlands
programme.desc: Travel from the cold deserts of Nevada to the giant cactus-studded lands of Arizona and the scorching Mojave Desert in California. Discover how some of America's most iconic animals like mustangs and coyotes have learned to survive.

programme.title: Wild West: The High Country
programme.desc: America's High Country is the last of grizzly bears and giant trees, of frigid winters and scorching summers, of tough ranchers and gold-rush fever. From the Rockies to the Sierra Nevada, survival in this land of extreme seasons demands endurance.

programme.title: Wild West: Restless Shores
programme.desc: Tectonic forces shape all life here, creating stunning landscapes like the San Andreas Fault, reaching north to the Pacific coast. Elephant seals battle it out for mates and grey whales form a unique friendship with a small community of people.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Industry experts and racing drivers come together to give their opinion on new cars.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Industry experts and racing drivers come together to give their opinion on new cars.

programme.desc: The war is fought on multiple fronts when the human city of Zion is invaded by thousands of Sentinels. Morpheus remains in Zion to aid in the fight, while Neo and Trinity make a deal with the Machines to deal with the renegade program known as Smith.

programme.title: Movie: The Matrix
programme.desc: A computer hacker called Neo learns that his entire reality is merely a computer-created illusion. In reality, humans are living batteries used by the machine armies that have taken over the world. Neo is the only person who can save humanity.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of the Nazi Markings

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Doomsday Forest
programme.desc: When mysterious structures are discovered deep in a remote forest, experts investigate if this strange site was the long-lost birthplace of a top-secret Nazi project that produced some of the deadliest weapons the world had ever seen.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chinese Nuclear Pyramid
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of a mythical lost pyramid in China that's been hidden for centuries, and experts suspect it could be just one of many unknown structures used as a secret military base designed for subterranean nuclear warfare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Imhotep's Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: After satellites spot an anomaly at Egypt's oldest pyramid, experts uncover a long-lost labyrinth. It could lead them to the darkest secrets of Imhotep, the mysterious high priest who built this strange complex.

programme.title: See No Evil: Cold Feet
programme.desc: 24-year-old Yale PHD student, Annie Le, goes missing. CCTV shows Annie arrive at Yale, but she is not seen leaving. All evidence points to something happening to Annie inside. Police search every inch of the building, until they find something horrific.

programme.title: See No Evil: Can I Help You?
programme.desc: In July 2013, shopkeeper Imran Ashgar is suddenly shot dead in his store in Columbus, Ohio. With the shooting caught on camera and the killers on the run, detectives are in an urgent race against time to capture them before they strike again.

programme.title: See No Evil: Manhunt
programme.desc: When loving couple Gary and Linda Haas fail to reach their vacation campsite, New Mexico State Police are called in to investigate. With no forensic evidence and no witnesses, all they can do is scour CCTV footage for clues to unravel the mystery.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Daughter's Fight
programme.desc: A woman is murdered, and her daughter is certain she knows who is responsible. But can she prove it? After five years a cold case turns hot, and investigators discover the suspect a pillar of the community is hiding secrets.

programme.title: A Deadly Dose: Marriage on the Rocks
programme.desc: When Susan, a wife and mother of two, dies from ingesting antifreeze and oxycodone, it's ruled a suicide. But her parents suspect that Susan's husband Brent is behind it.

programme.title: A Deadly Dose: Skeletons in the Closet
programme.desc: As Brent's drug use is exposed, witnesses defend him - including his assistant and his daughter, who both claim Susan had a dark side others didn't know about. But when phone records reveal more of Brent's lies, the team decides to put him under oath.

programme.title: A Deadly Dose: Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: In the wake of Brent's fiery deposition, new witnesses emerge that paint Susan as suicidal. Tony's team soon believes that the missing family computer holds the key to the case.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Capitol Offense
programme.desc: A mysterious figure threatens to expose the secret affair between two married politicians. Despite an outrageous cover up attempt, the situation spirals into a major public scandal, which ultimately derails multiple political careers.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cults: Jonestown Massacre
programme.desc: In the late 50's Jim Jones founded the People's Temple focused on helping those in need. By 1975 he was setting up what was supposed to be a utopia known as Jonestown. But utopia quickly turned into a hell as Jones spiraled deeper into his own paranoia.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cults: Word of Life
programme.desc: The Word of Life Church, starts as a small bible study group led by Pastor Jerry Irwin. After his death, his daughter Tiffanie gains control and makes life hell for the church followers, leading to the brutal death of a teenaged boy.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: CSI Slay
programme.desc: A beautiful, young woman is brutally murdered in her home. The NYPD follows a trail of complicated forensic clues to unravel the truth about who killed her, until a shocking discovery reveals that her murder is not what it seems.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: Baby Hope
programme.desc: A grisly discovery in a picnic cooler on a highway in upper Manhattan leads detectives down a twisting trail of clues as they try to solve one of the longest-running mysteries in the New York Post's history, and hunt down a deranged child killer.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: Million Dollar Murder
programme.desc: When businessman George Kogan is gunned down in broad daylight on a ritzy Upper East Side sidewalk, investigators must untangle a web of lies to figure out who wanted the millionaire dead... and how far they were willing to go to make it happen.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: The Millers always thought something was off with their oldest son Steven. But as he slips from strange into sinister, there's no telling how far Steven will go to get his respected New York family's attention.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Devil Went Down to Georgia
programme.desc: After a recent encounter with a peeping tom outside his daughter's bedroom window and another with a masked man in his own hallway, Jerry Glaser thinks someone is trying to kill him and takes his life into his own hands to protect himself and his family.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: He's Coming for Me
programme.desc: With a serial killer on the loose in Arlington, TX, 22-year-old Adriane Fields can't shake the chilling suspicion that she's next on the list. Crippled by fear, she moves across town, only to come face-to-face with what she feared most.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: One Last Goodbye
programme.desc: After breaking free from her controlling ex-husband, single mom Tanya Petro doesn't have much time to date. Until she meets Ron Gibson and falls helplessly in love with him. But just a few months into the relationship, Tanya mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Domestic Disturbance
programme.desc: With a new home and loving fiancé, single mom Lisa Filiaggi finally feels like luck is on her side. That is until troubles from her past come back to haunt her and threaten to destroy all her future plans.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Crime Scene Selfie
programme.desc: 23-year-old Amanda Taylor shares her entire life on the internet. Following a terrible tragedy, her posts begin take a dark turn.

programme.title: Web of Lies: High on Love
programme.desc: High school student Brandon Wentzell falls for blonde beauty Clarissa Chistiakov online. But the course of virtual love doesn't run smooth as the past collides with a toxic present, shattering lives.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Girl in the Photo
programme.desc: After a teenage house party spirals out of control, a shocking photo goes viral around the local schools. A vicious campaign of cyber bullying ensues that drives an innocent girl to take desperate action.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870s, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka and Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver and Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880s Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: John Gotti
programme.desc: The story of ambitious American mobster John Gotti, who became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head. He earned the nickname `Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Uncover the extraordinary truth behind some of the Mafia's most notorious outlaws.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Weapons
programme.desc: The story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of Iraq.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dilapidated Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle a 1930s dilapidated island cabin with major rot issues. They have a budget of $30,000 and six weeks to complete the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Retro-fit for the Whole Family
programme.desc: A couple found their own slice of heaven overlooking Lake Annabessacook, only to find out it needed more work than they could provide.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Hook, Line and Sinker
programme.desc: A couple buys a dilapidated cabin in Phillips, Maine, in hopes of keeping the area's fly-fishing traditions alive. Chase Morrill and his team pull out all the stops to fix a myriad of issues in just 11 weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Weekender
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael aim to help restore Galveston's reputation as America's 'Playground of the South.'

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Westport Wonder

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Revamp on the Outer Banks
Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Destined for a Renovation in Destin, Florida
programme.desc: Carrie and Lee have been splitting their time between Nashville and Destin, Florida but they want to get their two sons out of the city and into the sunshine - permanently.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Texas Transformation in Port Aransas
programme.desc: A woman and her kids have been vacationing in Port Aransas, TX, for years and are ready to own a piece of their favorite paradise.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Fripp Island Fix-Up
programme.desc: Jim and Sarah are looking for a diamond in the rough on the hidden gem of Fripp Island, North Carolina. They find a property with an unparalleled oceanfront overlook.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Use Your Noodle: The Reload
programme.desc: Reloading an earlier episode, Alton revisits cold-water pasta cooking, and shares his recipe for Cacio a Pepe.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: For Whom The Cheese Melts: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic fondue show with some cheesy science and a completely new recipe, because he really didn't like the first one that much anyway. The Lady of the Refrigerator returns and boy, is she mad!

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Flay vs. Pham
programme.desc: Iron Chef Bobby Flay faces off against Challenger Viet Pham. Chef Pham is co-owner of Forage, an award-winning restaurant in Salt Lake City. Judges are Simon Majumdar, Donatella Arpaia and Ben Sargent.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Zakarian vs. Ferraro

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Colorado Sweets
programme.desc: Colorado has some amazing sweets. Head to High Point Creamery in Denver from some unusual ice cream flavors like lemon ice pop with raspberry swirl and earl grey tea with shortbread.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Cute and Sweet
programme.desc: Today we visit three locations that pack big flavors in small servings. First stop is Cake Monkey Bakery in Los Angeles to try some of their mini layer cakes.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Old Is New Again
programme.desc: Classic desserts get deliciously updated at three sweet shops across the country. Skull and Cakebones rocks vegan cupcakes in Austin, Texas, with flavors like basil berry, dirty chai and just beet it.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Savory Sweets
programme.desc: Sweet and savory flavors are such an irresistible combination. We visit three sweet and savory hot spots including Aiko Pops in Denver, where ice pops come in radical flavors like raspberry and sweet corn.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Awesome Asheville Sweets
programme.desc: At the speakeasy Nightbell, they take traditional Southern dishes, add a little culinary magic, and turn them into bite-sized morsels that will surprise and satisfy. The Hop creates some of the most unique and delicious ice cream flavors imaginable.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Ice Cream Nation
programme.desc: At Morgentern's Finest Ice Cream in New York, inventive flavors and unusual toppings take center stage.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Sweet Stuff
programme.desc: From passionfruit creme brulee in Hawaii to lemon ice box pie in Mississippi, Duff Goldman, Alex Guarnaschelli, Alton Brown and Claire Robinson are bringing you a sugary shortlist that you won't want to miss.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Brunch!
programme.desc: Whether you like your brunch savory or sweet, we've got you covered. Your favorite Food Network stars are sharing their best brunch orders at restaurants around the country.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kyoto
programme.desc: Andrew explores the elaborate feasts, home-cooked comfort food, sushi and confections of Kyoto, Japan. From the artistic multi-course dining experience to the everyday humble comfort foods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the flavour-packed favourites of Savannah, Georgia, like creamy shrimp and grits, briny oysters in a half shell, upscale crab bisque and down-home barbecue stew so thick it'll make your spoon stand up.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chesapeake Bay
programme.desc: Andrew tastes his way through the Chesapeake Bay area, trying creamy peanut soup and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jerusalem
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern investigates the rich culinary heritage of Jerusalem. From savory classics like shawarma, falafel, kubbeh and hummus to tempting pastries like halva and bureka, this holy city's edible icons are steeped in history.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Charleston
programme.desc: Andrew explores coastal classics like shrimp and grits, she-crab soup, and barbecue.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Louisville, Kentucky
programme.desc: Andrew explores Louisville icons like country ham, burgoo stew, and derby pie.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Austin, Texas
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing trek across America brings him to Austin, TX. He starts with a 2-pound barbecue behemoth packed with every meat, sauce and side on the menu.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Philadelphia, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb sails to Philadelphia to tackle the epic Classic Whale Challenge, a 13-pound bagel sandwich stuffed with cream cheese, nova salmon, whitefish, tomatoes and onions.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Seattle, Washington
programme.desc: Casey travels to Seattle where he climbs a Mount Fuji-sized burger and takes on seven terrifyingly spicy Buffalo wings that have defeated over 5,000 challengers.

programme.title: Fancy Nancy: Tea for Three / Nancy and Bree Take a Vacation
programme.desc: Nancy uses the power of the tea party to help Grandpa and Mrs. Devine get along. Nancy struggles to understand why Bree wants a vacation… from her.

programme.title: Bluey: Rug Island/ Hairdressers/ Sticky Gecko
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Suitcase Switcheroo / More Cowbell for Bob
programme.desc: When Bob mixes up his suitcase with another traveler, the pugs head to Spain on a mission to retrieve it. Then, Bob can't find his signature instrument for the reunion of his high school rock band.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Blue Belt/ The Playcare Heist
programme.desc: Bob's blue belt doesn't arrive in time for his martial arts class photo, so Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to get him a belt. When Keia realizes she accidentally left her favorite stuffed animal at Playcare, she and the pugs set off to rescue it.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: All Aboard Babies
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Out Foxed/ Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Freddy's status as the best hide-and-seeker is challenged after he and Pip lose to a baby fox. Pip and Freddy help K.C. earn her first Golden Feather on Cleaning Day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hawaii Pug-Oh/ A.R.F.
programme.desc: When Bob says he'd love to feel the sand on his toes, pug puppy brothers Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to Hawaii. Then, Bob introduces the pups to A.R.F., a robotic dog he created that is programmed to clean up their messes.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Hard Hat Diggity Dog! / Hair-Raising Helpers!
programme.desc: Mickey and friends go on adventures around Hot Dog Hills.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mixed-Up for a Day!/ Princess Clarabelle!
programme.desc: A special winner gets mixed-up for the day! When Clarabelle ends up with the hidden royal scepter, everyone in Royalandia thinks she's the new princess!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Bouncy Bouncy Baby/ Like Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Pip gets locked inside a crate with a baby kangaroo. Pip and Freddy must teach squabbling kitten and puppy siblings to share.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fastest Flier / Best Friends Wherever
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach Ava that there is more to a delivery than speed. When Mia can't say goodbye to her friend, Chloe, the Junior Fliers show her that they can keep in touch!

programme.title: Bluey: Grannies / Yoga Ball / Calypso
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey have a question for their Nana; Mum teaches Bingo how to use her bark; Bluey and her friends learn from their teacher, Calypso.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Green Fingers
programme.desc: After Schwoz creates a disease that accidentally effects Charlotte, Henry, his family, and even Ray, he quarantines them in Henry's house in order to find a cure.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Space Invaders
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger find out that an astronaut from Swellview has been taken hostage aboard the Space Station.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Beat the Parents
programme.desc: Nervous about meeting his girlfriend's parents, Max enlists help from Phoebe, whose charms ultimately backfire and leave Max banned from ever seeing his girlfriend again.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Date of Emergency
programme.desc: Phoebe fakes a romance after feeling left out with her friends all in relationships, but keeping her lie going proves to be harder than she expected.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Wishy Washy/ Poof's Playdate
programme.desc: Timmy's wish for a magical car wash that rejuvenated anything has unexpected consequences. Timmy wishes for fairy babies to play with poof.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Weirdos on a Train/ Tons of Timmys
programme.desc: Dad and Crocker make a deal. As a result, Crocker becomes best friends with Dinkerberg. Timmy wishes up 5,000 Timmys for the Planet of the Dads. The Timmys kidnap Wanda and Cosmo.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Operation: Normal/ Sparring Partner
programme.desc: Leo and Donnie try desperately to help April enjoy a quiet day with a new friend. Raph becomes friends with a new sparring partner and must keep it secret from his brothers who don't like the guy.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: You Got Served/ How to Make Enemies and Bend People to Your Will
programme.desc: Leo and Mikey get sidetracked by a brotherly competition while helping Señor Hueso. And, Baron Draxum struggles to move up in the Foot Clan.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mystic Library/ The Purple Game
programme.desc: The Turtles plumb the depths of a mysterious hidden library in search of a way to rescue Mayhem. A competitive new video game has swept New York and Donnie will do anything to reach rank number one.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Man vs. Sewer/ The Mutant Menace
programme.desc: Ralph is separated and left alone during the Turtles' lazy river ride through the sewers. And, all of New York is turned against the Turtles after failed attempts to do good deeds.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Arr in the Family/ Finders Weepers
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne wants to help CJ to get onstage at a Pirate Dinner Show. Then, Ronnie and Sid decide whether to take money from a lost coin purse they found at the mercado.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Mexican Makeover/ Uptown Funk
programme.desc: With Mama Lupe coming to visit, Abuela tries to make sure her family represents their culture perfectly. Adelaide and Carl must work together on an adventure on Mr. Chang's route.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Boss Maybe/ Family's Bonding
programme.desc: Leni takes over for Lori as the family babysitter, but struggles to live up to her. The Loud's get new neighbours, but when they start acting suspicious, secret agents Lincoln and Clyde investigate.

programme.title: The Loud House: Read Aloud/ Not a Loud
programme.desc: The family embarks on a reading challenge at the library, but Lola refuses to participate. When Lincoln discovers the first page of his baby book is blank, he worries his parents are hiding something.

programme.title: The Loud House: Heavy Meddle/ Making the Case
programme.desc: After being picked on, Lincoln regrets telling his sisters to stay out of his business. When a video contest opens at school, Lincoln decides to record his sisters embarrassing themselves.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fool's Paradise/ Job Insecurity
programme.desc: With prankster Luan away at camp for April Fool's Day, the Louds think they should be safe. The kids discover Dad isn't at his old job anymore and worry it might be their fault.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One
programme.desc: While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business. Later, Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: You Don't Know Sponge/ Tunnel of Glove
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take a friendship test. Pearl is embarrassed when she must sit next to SpongeBob in the Tunnel of Glove.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Accidents Will Happen/ The Other Patty
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs is manipulated into caring for Squidward when he gets injured on the job. Mr. Krabs and Plankton both have troubles at the new 'Flabby Patty' restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob, You're Fired!
programme.desc: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob; however, unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work, no matter what - or where.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pizza Delivery
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has SpongeBob and Squidward go above and beyond the call of duty to make the first successful Krabby Patty pizza delivery.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Fish in Town/ Love That Squid
programme.desc: A new neighbour moves in and becomes Squidward’s best friend.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman Begins/ Plankton's Good Eye
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick learn the secret origins of Mermaid Man and Branacle Boy from the heroes themselves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dear Vikings/ Ditchin'
programme.desc: When Krusty Krab starts a new promotion in honour of the Vikings, SpongeBob sets out to learn all he can about this civilization.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongicus/ Suction Cup Symphony
programme.desc: Plankton builds a Roman coliseum, and puts on a free gladiator show featuring togas, chariots, and ferocious lionfish. / Squidward is determined to win the Bikini Bottom Symphony's composition contest, but SpongeBob and Patrick keep distracting him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Back to the Past / The Bad Guy Club for Villains
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick travel back in time to see the young Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. The pair enjoy a classic Mermaidman and Barnacleboy episode.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Naughty Nautical Neighbors/ Boating School
programme.desc: Squidward makes Spongebob and Patrick think they're no longer friends; Boating exams.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Gauntlet
programme.desc: April gets a warning from her imprisoned father, and she and the turtles go on a mission to stop Kraang from detonating a mutagen bomb on the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Panic in the Sewers
programme.desc: The Turtles must defend their home in the sewers when Bradford tries to destroy it with a dangerous chemical.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mousers Attack!
programme.desc: The Turtles are split up during simultaneous threats from the Purple Dragons and Baxter Stockman's mechanical Mousers. Donnie and Mikey must prove that their 'B Team' is just as valuable as Leo and Ralph's 'A Team'.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: It Came From the Depths
programme.desc: An unstable mutant alligator possesses a strange piece of Kraang technology. While Michelangelo befriends him, the other Turtles aren't sure whether Leatherhead can be trusted or not.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: Leonardo, tired of Raphael's constant criticism, lets his brother try his hand at leadership for a while. Meanwhile, Leonardo meets a beautiful and dangerous female ninja who tries to lure Leonardo to the dark side.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: I, Monster
programme.desc: The turtles must face off against a new enemy, the Rat King, who threatens to take control of the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Alien Agenda
programme.desc: April's school project draws Kraang attention.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Pulverizer
programme.desc: A fanboy dresses up as 'The Pulverizer' and decides to fight crime.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: To Serve and Protect/ Kickin' It Old School
programme.desc: Simon is ecstatic when he's elected the school's safety monitor, but when Alvin goofs off at school, Simon has to choose between doing the right thing or giving Alvin detention. Dave takes away the Chipmunks technology.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Albrittina/ Simon for President
programme.desc: When Alvin catches Simon taking a test to discover his soul mate, he decides to do the same and prove just how silly the test really is. Simon and Alvin decide to rebel and launch their own campaigns for class president.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Tree House/ Saving Simon
programme.desc: While cleaning out their treehouse, the girls remember how they made it their home. Believing Simon is going away to a boarding school, Alvin and Theodore do all they can to stop his departure and keep him at home.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Back to School/ Bromance
programme.desc: When Dave discovers he didn't graduate from high school, he finds himself in school with Alvin. Simon has found a new best friend, Jamie. But when Jamie realizes that Alvin is the more popular brother, he ditches Simon.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Safety Third/ Mister Manners
programme.desc: When Dave refuses to let Alvin get a dangerous toy sports car, Alvin secretly convinces Simon to build him a replica of the car. Alvin must pass a manners course before he gets his dream meeting with the Princess of England.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Beddy Bye/ The Grass Is Always Greener
programme.desc: Timmy always falls asleep at 9 p.m., so he wishes for a world without sleep, much to the chagrin of the human race and the Sandman. Timmy runs away to become a carnie.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Bored Identity/ Country Clubbed
programme.desc: Dad is depressed because everyone thinks he is boring. Timmy wishes Dad's life was more like an action movie. Timmy and his parents get invited to a country club. Cosmo feuds with a gopher. Timmy wishes to be a socialite.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Operation Fun/ Smart Attack
programme.desc: Remy Buxaplenty has come home from military school for spring break. All he can talk about is how great his new school is, making Timmy and friends jealous; Dad keeps trying to help Timmy with his homework, but he's not the brightest dad.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairly OddPet
programme.desc: Jealous that everyone else in Dimmsdale has a dog, Timmy adopts a fairy dog. But this proves to be a bigger challenge than Timmy expected.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Smells Like Team Spirit
programme.desc: Phoebe and Max must work together on series of superhero team building exercises, but their different approaches to training puts their future as a crime fighting team at risk.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Thundermans: Banished!
programme.desc: After the Thundermans' superhero secret is exposed and life at home becomes unmanageable, the family is relocated to a new city.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Max to the Future
programme.desc: Concerned that he isn't considered a valuable superhero, Max creates a machine that can predict future crimes, but when it doesn't work, he spins a web of lies to keep the truth from Phoebe.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Living Mummies of Toth-Ra
programme.desc: In a lost pyramid, Louie interprets a pharaoh's prophecy to his advantage, forcing Scrooge and Launchpad to convince a group of living mummies to rescue him.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Nega-Globby
programme.desc: Honey Lemon sets out to cure Globby and make him human again. However, Big Hero 6 must now face a new different evil glob-like villain.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Crash and Burnout
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The Yeet Eater
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Killer App
programme.desc: Wasabi’s need for order clashes with Hiro’s chaotic work style when they collaborate on a school project. They must learn to respect and embrace their differences to save the day.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Kentucky Kaiju
programme.desc: Hiro decides to upgrade himself with a superpower of his own: super strength. Unfortunately, his new tech backfires.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!
programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Dragon's Ultimate Awakening!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Heart of Fire! Heart of Stone!
programme.desc: Brock and Misty continue to enjoy their Alola region vacation, but there are some who would like that to stop.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: DuckTales: Louie's Eleven!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Failure Mode
programme.desc: Hiro becomes demoralized when his latest school project fails spectacularly.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater
programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gargoyle Gals/ Supermarket Scandal
programme.desc: To impress her new friend, Tilly claims she saw stone gargoyles come to life.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill

programme.desc: On the trip to Big City movie multiplex, Cricket thinks he’s too mature for a kids’ movie, so he sneaks into a grown-up movie. Cricket registers his house on a homeshare website.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Ocean Frank

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: See One, Do One, Teach One
programme.desc: Detective Rizzoli and medical examiner Isles investigate the grisly murder of a wealthy couple. The M.O. matches the work of a serial killer known as the Surgeon. Now that the Surgeon is behind bars, it seems a protégé is picking up where he left off.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Boston Strangler Redux
programme.desc: Tensions are high as the squad investigates a possible copycat of the legendary Boston Strangler.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Sympathy for the Devil
programme.desc: Jane and Maura investigate the mysterious death of a young boy who may have died during an attempted exorcism.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: She Works Hard for the Money

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism

programme.desc: In 2003, the wildly successful careers of master illusionists Siegfried & Roy comes to a shockingly abrupt end when one of the team’s prized tigers bites Roy Horn on the neck and drags him offstage.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Siegfried & Roy: Dangerous Illusion (Part 2)
programme.desc: Roy tries to recover from severe wounds inflicted by his beloved tiger Mantacore, but the team’s excuses for the animal’s behavior lose credibility upon further investigation.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Rumble in the Bush
programme.desc: Gabe is attacked by an aggressive ostrich and loses one of his most prized possessions in the process. When the ranch gets hit with the first snowfall, the family builds a big bonfire to unfreeze the ground under their house site.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Range Ridin'
programme.desc: When the ranch comes under fire from encroaching hunters, Gabe takes it upon himself to learn to ride a horse as the family constructs a fence around the property. And later, Gabe and Raquell leave the mountain for the birth of their baby girl.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Off the Grid: Bush Below Zero
programme.desc: Loaded with exclusive new footage from the Bush: The Wolfpack prioritizes shelters for the livestock as a brutal cold front approaches. The siblings must now make a risky journey to salvage lumber.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Water to Ice
programme.desc: A deep freeze halts the water supply, sending the ranch into a new crisis. And with a critical load of lumber delivered to the base of their mountain, the Wolfpack must problem solve to get their house back on track.

programme.title: Expeditions to the Edge: It All Falls Apart
programme.desc: Fear of overwintering in the Arctic becomes more and more real as the crew becomes trapped in ice. Tensions on the ship reach a boiling part pushing one crew member over the edge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: France: Flooded Out in Croatia
programme.desc: Pascal and Lea are dropped in the Croatian forest with vipers, bears and wolves. Just a few days in the challenge, they face extreme weather that floods their perfect shelter, forcing them to migrate to survive. Their journey is translated to English.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Punishment in Panama
programme.desc: Clint Jivoin and Laura Zerra are Naked and Afraid on a Panamanian island for 21 days. Plagued by sand flies and threatened by snakes and crocodiles the pair have to stick together using all their skills and experience to survive in the tropical hell.
