programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Freakshow on Wheels
programme.desc: An enthusiastic cowboy is looking for a rat rod to lift the spirits of his small town. Steve quickly lands on the idea of making a death-defying carnival ride on wheels.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Vintage Speed Racer
programme.desc: When a couple of local hot rod builders challenge Steve to compete in a race that features only 'period correct' post-war restorations, he can’t say no; but his plan to make a race-ready 1931 Ford in just a week and a half has the team on edge.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Trucker's Dream
programme.desc: The Hiltz Auto Company team pulls out all the stops for a local trucker with a dream. Using Chad's vintage toys as inspiration and utilizing Colton's improved welding skills, the team converts a '34 Oldsmobile sedan into a unique, functioning dump truck.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Hot Rod From Heaven
programme.desc: The 10th-Annual Rockabilly Weekend car show is right around the corner and Chad has big plans for this year's raffle car! The team races to transform a rusted-out '38 Ford into an open-motor, fenderless hotrod that's guaranteed to sell tickets.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Bad Chad to the Bone
programme.desc: Chad gets pushed to his limits when a local body shop owner tasks him with his first-ever motorcycle build. With the Wharf Rat Bike Rally just two weeks away, Chad races the clock to visualize, customize and materialize the one-of-a-kind chopper.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Chad vs. Pinto
programme.desc: Chad takes on his most ambitious build yet: transforming a rusted-out 1971 Pinto into a European-style performance car framed in glass. With only four weeks to work and a mountain of problems facing him, Chad risks missing a deadline for the first time.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: Texas' Last Stand
programme.desc: The points races has heated up to an all-time high and the racers are willing to do anything to get ahead. Ryan still leads in points but Lizzy and Kye are hot on his heels.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: Callout Karma
programme.desc: Round 2 hits the racers at a time when every decision can either make or break them. Points leader Ryan Martin becomes painfully aware of the consequences of his decisions when it matters most.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: Down to the Wire
programme.desc: Only two races remain and the points championship is coming down to the wire. Ryan feels the pressure as Team NOLA's racers pull out all the stops. Team Texas makes a surprise alliance and the Outcasts are poised to strike back.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: It Ain't Over Yet
programme.desc: Round two of the seventh race begins. Team NOLA's strategy in round one didn't pan out, but they still have a chance to impact the points standings if leaders draw one of their names.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: Don't Choke
programme.desc: Ryan rolls into the final event at the top of the leaderboard and with each round worth double points, the pressure is on to not let the elusive NPK trophy slip away for a third time. Kye, Lizzy and Scott do everything in their power to derail him.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: Do or Die
programme.desc: The second round of the season's final race has arrived and all eyes are on Ryan as he attempts bring home the championship after two unsuccessful seasons. Kye and Lizzy are his only competition but they're laser-focused on taking the win for themselves.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: Grudge Night Illinois Route 66
programme.desc: With team NOLA looking stronger than ever, the 405 doubles down on their grudge strategy in an attempt to keep up. Meanwhile, a team of outcasts joins forces to compete and team Texas sees their chances of pulling out a win slipping out of reach.

programme.desc: Geoffrey settles back home. Lisa confronts Usman. Ed leaves the Philippines. Avery and Ash spend time with his son. Darcey rethinks her priorities. Stephanie and Erika say goodbye. Yolanda wants answers. David continues his quest for Lana.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: She Popped the Thigh at Me
programme.desc: Bride Samantha has mastered her weight-loss goals, but can she get her mom to like her wedding dress? Shock jock Ashlee wants a ball gown that will make her mother blush. Plus, a bride has a glam wedding in Puerto Rico.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Birthday Surprise
programme.desc: Bachelor alum Caila found her real-life prince charming, but to find her fairy-tale gown she must listen to her heart. Ridicule for her love of feathers has Jocelyn heartbroken and her consultant scrambling. Plus, a birthday surprise is in the works.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: We're Having SIX-tuplets
programme.desc: The Waldrops are a family from Alabama with three lively boys. Parents Courtney and Eric get the shock of their lives when Courtney becomes pregnant with sextuplets. They face a high-risk delivery and the stress of becoming parents of nine kids overnight.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: What to Expect When You're Expecting Six Babies
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric struggle through a high-risk delivery. Six premature babies must survive the NICU and prepare to come home during a national flu crisis. One baby takes a turn for the worse, as the family faces nonstop feedings and mounting expenses.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Shelly
programme.desc: Mother-of-two Shelley has been penny-pinching in Mesa, Ariz. for over 20 years. But Shelley's biggest money-saving challenge is going to be throwing her daughter Ashley's wedding on a $1,000 budget.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Rick and Karissa/ Torski
programme.desc: Karissa and her husband Rick have been competing to be cheaper than the other since their wedding five years ago. By sharing everything from their shower to a single toothbrush, this cheapskate couple has no limit to their cost cutting.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: All Wrapped Up
programme.desc: Todd Moriarty is obsessed with preserving the value of his assets. In an effort to keep his home looking like new, he wraps all of his possessions - from his car to his bathroom, in plastic wrap.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Terence/ Greg
programme.desc: Terence and Greg cause friction when others rebel against their bare-bones budgets.

programme.desc: Instead of getting on the ship headed for summer camp, SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally board a ship full of prisoners on their way to jail on Inferno Island.

programme.desc: The postman's truck gets stuck in the mud, and the mail gets stuck in a tree. Mayor Goodway turns into a frog.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Around the World/ Castle/ Grandpa Pig's Train to the Rescue
programme.desc: Peppa and her family set off to the park to celebrate the beginning of the summer holidays. Mummy and Daddy pig take Peppa and George on a visit to a castle. Grandpa Pig lends Miss Rabbits his little train Gertrude.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi: Movie Madness!
programme.desc: It's a night out at the movies for the Team. But the Troublemakers show up and make off with all the movie snacks. Milli, Geo and Bot chase the Troublemakers through the cinema and transport into action-packed movies.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi: Dr. Bot
programme.desc: When the Team's friend Mike falls off his scooter and scrapes his knee, it's Dr. Bot to the rescue.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Come to Your Senses!
programme.desc: Oh no! Nonny broke his glasses! When they're fixed, Nonny is determined to retrieve them on his won. But to do it, he'll have to depend on his other four senses to reach the glasses store before it closes.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Snow Squad to the Rescue
programme.desc: When someone's stealing sleeping bags from campers, Gil is convinced a yeti is to blame.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Colors Everywhere with Blue
programme.desc: Josh and Blue are painting a portrait of their friends, but it's not quite finished. We play Blue's Clues to figure out who else Blue wants to add to her painting.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Deep Sea Grand Prix
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Blaze and AJ are racing under the ocean! Blaze transforms into a submarine and speeds through sunken ships and coral reefs to reach the giant sand castle at the finish line.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Tigers
programme.desc: When searching for elusive rumble top tigers, the Turbots fall into a cave deep inside a volcano. The PAW Patrol does a paratrooper style rescue from Skye's Ultimate copter in this Ultimate Aviator Rescue.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pup Pup Goose/ Pup Pup and Away
programme.desc: When Marshall's new gosling friend gets lost, the PAW Patrol must find him before his flock flies away. When Mayor Goodway accidentally takes off in a hot air balloon, Ryder and the Paw Patrol must make a dramatic rescue to save her and win the race.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Woof and Roll Show/ Pups Save An Eagle
programme.desc: When a big pop star comes to town, a storm blows the whole town apart, including the stage! later, while out in the woods, the pups rescue an eagle caught in twine and tied to her own nest.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: When Super Kitties Attack
programme.desc: The Kitty Catastrophe crew gets super powers, and now those little kittens are causing big problems all over town! It'll take the Mighty Pups and their Super Paws to stop them and restore order to Adventure Bay!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Barnacle Face/ Pet Sitter Pat
programme.desc: The night before the big school dance, Mr. Krabs asks SpongeBob to help Pearl get rid of a barnacle on her face.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Food Con Castaways/ Snail Mail
programme.desc: The gang heads to a food convention, but things go awry when they become stranded in the woods. Later SpongeBob accidentally fibs to his pen pal, but when his friend comes to visit, he must keep the ruse going!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Call the Cops/ Surf N' Turf
programme.desc: Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence so SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs plot to get it back. Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a big contest, so SpongeBob calls in a little extra help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Greasy Buffoons/ Model Sponge
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton woo customers with greasy entrees. SpongeBob tries a career at being a model in a kitchen sponge commercial.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Texas Flash Flood
programme.desc: A flash flood in the Texas Hill Country kills 13 people and destroys 350 homes. A father watches helplessly as his house is pulled down the river, and his wife and two children are tossed into the current.

programme.title: Deadline to Disaster: Holiday Hell
programme.desc: It's the day after Christmas 2015 and 13 tornadoes hit the Dallas, Texas area. Just after dark, the strongest an EF4, rages through Garland and Rowlett tossing cars from an overpass.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Arkansas Flash Flood
programme.desc: A flash flood at an Arkansas campsite flood leaves 20 dead, including 7 children.

programme.title: Deadline to Disaster: Gulf of Mexico Monster
programme.desc: Hurricane Michael becomes only the 4th Cat 5 to ever hit the U.S. mainland. As Michael's fury peaks, deadly flying projectiles force a storm tracker and his team to ride out the eyewall in their car.

programme.title: Top 100 Weather Moments: Top 100 Weather Moments #80-61
programme.desc: Countdown of incredible weather moments from 80 to 61 including fires, floods and freaky storms.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Hurricane on the Horizon

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Trapped in a Blizzard

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Curtis
programme.desc: On April 10, 1995, in Aurora, Colorado, 15-year-old Curtis was one of four teens involved in the death of Christopher as they attempted to steal his car. After 23 years in jail, Curtis has been granted a resentencing and could soon be released.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Preston
programme.desc: On March 4, 2010, 17-year-old Preston was one of three teens involved in a murder during an attempted robbery in Fort Walton Beach, Florida. Along with the other teens, Preston was sentenced to life without parole.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: James
programme.desc: On November 24, 1990, 15-year-old James killed his stepmother and three young brothers with a shotgun, and then set their rural Wyoming home on fire.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Otis
programme.desc: On March 31, 1998 in Albany, Georgia, 16-year-old Otis broke into Valerie's home and allegedly tried to rob her. During the attempt, Valerie and her 16-year-old daughter, Valene, were shot. Valerie dies weeks later and her daughter was disfigured.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Aaron
programme.desc: On January 31, 2011, 14-year-old Aaron shot his neighbor, 14-year-old Alana, in her home in Harlem, Georgia. Aaron was sentenced to life without parole at 15, but now 21-year-old Aaron is appealing his sentence.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Bobby
programme.desc: Bobby shot girlfriend Krissi's mother and father as they slept in their home in Frisco, Texas. The mother died, but the father survived. Bobby was sentenced to life despite claims he was manipulated into committing the murder.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Ronald
programme.desc: On February 2, 1999, 17-year-old Ronald and two other teens sought to retaliate against Cordell for an alleged sexual assault ultimately burning him alive in the woods of Fort Walton Beach, Florida.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Brandon
programme.desc: On August 21, 2001, a group of teens, including 15-year-old Brandon, kidnapped and raped Melissa, a 21-year-old college student in Youngstown, Ohio.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Special
programme.desc: Otis' attorney works to strike a deal to make him eligible for parole. Kristel has a resentencing hearing for her role in the 1999 murder of Cordell, while his family testifies against her. Kristel's co-defendant, Ronald, learns his fate.

programme.title: The First 48: Underworld
programme.desc: In Miami, the homicide team investigate the murder of a man found brutally beaten to death below a major interstate.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cake Loss

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Unmotivational Speaker
programme.desc: Find out which classic Joker’s lines are still being uttered and which of the Alma Mater’s gets mentioned. Plus, what inspired tonight’s punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bellydancer
programme.desc: Learn about Murr and Sal's favourite sandwich, which Joker is certified in CPR and what gift Murr received when the show first started.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pick a Loser
programme.desc: Find out which Joker was arrested in a foreign country and why the Jokers filmed at Madison Square Park often in the early days. Plus, learn the camera crew's motto.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Fashion
programme.desc: Find out what challenge needed to be cancelled and rescheduled three times, and why some people didn't want to be included in the show. Plus, learn what questions the guys prepared that didn't make the cut.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 7
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 8

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scaredy Cat

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Down in the Dump

programme.desc: Kelly Osbourne and Jack Osbourne, Loni Love and James Welsh, and Erin Andrews and Jarret Stoll compete remotely from their homes in a night of fun and games.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Three Daughters, Three Problems
programme.desc: Terry’s eldest daughter Rachel’s new real estate career needs help, Lacey’s husband doesn’t want to move to Texas and Erin has been keeping a secret from him about a recent change to her appearance.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Terry is in a Jam
programme.desc: The Bradshaw clan travels to Dallas as Terry is hosting (and driving in) the big Monster Jam truck rally. When Terry suffers from a panic attack, an old sibling rivalry is forced to come to a head.

programme.title: In the Room: Kourtney Kardashian
programme.desc: Kourtney Kardashian invites Jason Kennedy over to her house for a raw and real conversation. She talks life in the spotlight, finding a balance as a mom, love, breaking up as well as dishing on her famous siblings.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The New Normal
programme.desc: Even though things are changing for the Kardashian family in ways they never expected, they are determined to remember that family always comes first.

programme.desc: Kris starts dating someone after 25 years with Bruce, and no one is more critical than her daughters. Khloé ends up in hot water over a controversial Instagram post, and Kim gets a lesson in manners when she tries to recruit Kourtney for her video game.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Carfather
programme.desc: When Scott has a flurry of suspicious activity and vague business dealings, the family decides to pull back the curtain on Scott's man-of-mystery persona. Kris worries she's made a mistake with her living will; Kim stops Bruce from spending all his money.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Retreat
programme.desc: With Rob in crisis, the family intervenes, but when Rob refuses help, Kris is at her wit's end. Khloé leads a Dash teambuilding retreat, and Kim learns that getting pregnant again might not be in the cards.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: On the Road
programme.desc: When Khloé closes the book on her relationship with French Montana, Malika gets caught in the crossfire. Kris drags Kylie on a mother-daughter bonding trip to San Diego, and Kim speaks at a Silicon Valley tech conference.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Special Delivery
programme.desc: A security breach motivates Kris to step up security. Scott goes to a Lord Disick party in Vegas while Kourtney finds out the baby could come early, and Kim and Khloé put together a last-minute baby shower.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Buggy Boo
programme.desc: The birth of child number three sends Scott spiraling, and Khloé enlists Bruce to help bring Scott back down to earth. Kylie's wish of owning a home comes true and Kim gets an unexpected treat when Kanye shoots a music video with North.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Calm After the Storm
programme.desc: Game Warden Eddins helps a neighbour in need. Reneau responds to a call about a baby red-tailed hawk. Game Warden Richards attempts to serve an arrest warrant. Game Warden Startz patrols solo on the Guadalupe River. Wardens monitor the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Shrimp and Run
programme.desc: For Texas game wardens, the unexpected is all part of the routine. A shrimp boat tries to make a run for it. One warden makes some furry friends. A simple trespass warning turns into a trip to jail. A warden helps a woman spiraling out of control.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Confessions of a Poacher
programme.desc: Warden Richards confronts a suspected poacher for illegally hunting ducks and geese. Wardens Ben and Chelsea Bailey monitor an injured deer running along a busy highway, and a man is arrested after confessing to poaching a deer.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Tempers Are Rising
programme.desc: Warden Cummings deals with an angry man who blew a stop sign. Warden Boone helps chase a trio of armed robbers on the run, and Warden Inman investigates a group of suspected deer hunters for trespassing.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Chasing a Dead Man
programme.desc: In Llano County, a jet skier's life is spared after an explosion on the water. When a man fakes his own death, Warden Herchman and Stapleton join forces to track him down, and a man is found trespassing while fishing.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters: New Dawn Rises
programme.desc: Pressure is on the Dirt Dogs after a five-month shutdown.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters: Heartbreak and Ambition
programme.desc: The Dirt Dogs hit a possible jackpot while the Gold Gypsies' season begins with heartbreak. Ted and Lecky Mahoney hit the gold trail.

programme.desc: In Llano County, a jet skier's life is spared after an explosion on the water. When a man fakes his own death, Warden Herchman and Stapleton join forces to track him down, and a man is found trespassing while fishing.

programme.desc: Warden Cummings deals with an angry man who blew a stop sign. Warden Boone helps chase a trio of armed robbers on the run, and Warden Inman investigates a group of suspected deer hunters for trespassing.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters: New Dawn Rises

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters: Heartbreak and Ambition
programme.desc: The Dirt Dogs hit a possible jackpot while the Gold Gypsies' season begins with heartbreak. Ted and Lecky Mahoney hit the gold trail.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Toughest Job in Texas
programme.desc: An alligator poacher brags online and Wardens go after him. Down on the border Wardens pull illegal nets from the river while looking for drug smugglers.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: When Deer Attack
programme.desc: Game Wardens patrol the Rio Grande in search of an unidentified body.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Save the Elephants
programme.desc: An elephant family has a potentially deadly virus affecting animals in captivity and in the wild. With the youngest members of the family most at risk, the keepers and the zoo's veterinary team must do all they can to combat the mysterious illness.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Fledgling Penguins
programme.desc: It's graduation day for the fledgling penguins that have spent six months in their nursery being cared for by the keepers.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Black Rhinos
programme.desc: Chester is home to ten critically endangered Black Rhinos. With numbers in the wild dwindling, the zoo's breeding program is a key part of preserving the species. There's concern about Kitani's ability to defend herself after damaging her horn.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Tia and Country Matt team up to rescue a reportedly aggressive dog. When a local student wants to adopt a dog that can join her on runs, Earl joins in the training regimen. And, parolee Jammall oversees the care of a dog with serious health issues.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Fire Dog
programme.desc: A potential best friend needs to pass a unique test before he can be adopted out. Parolee Jammall returns after a mysterious absence. A year after losing their house in a fire, M2 and Kanani do something special for the dog who saved their lives.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Last of the Mobsters
programme.desc: Tia and her kids race to rescue a stray dog near a dangerous, busy highway. An adoption requires some temperament testing in an 18-wheel truck when a trucker wants to adopt a dog to join him on the road. And, a return adopter seeks out a senior dog.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Box of Puppies
programme.desc: A potential adopter wants to give a forever home to a senior dog that has only known life in a kennel. M2 and Kanani are shocked when they find a box of puppies in a field. And, Matt and Earl head to the kitchen to cook up some fresh food for a sick dog.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Dream Realized
programme.desc: Two strays lead Lizzy and Villalobos employees on a wild goose chase. A grandmother comes to Villalobos looking for another canine companion, but her dog Daisy has other plans. And, Tania pursues her dream to write a children's book.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Southern Dogs in the City
programme.desc: Villalobos is invited to participate in Dog Bowl, creating a chance for a handful of dogs to steal the spotlight. M2 helps a neglected dog left in horrible conditions. And a couple takes the first step towards becoming parents - adopting a Villalobos dog.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Sisters in Rescue
programme.desc: When a 3-legged dog has trouble finding a forever home, Amanda Giese from Panda Paws Rescue comes to New Orleans to help. Parolee Troy shares some life changing news with Tia and the VRC crew. And, Villalobos helps an employee's dad find a new companion.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Everything Is Hungry
programme.desc: Winter is here and the time for preparation is over. Bob deals with the ramifications of crashing his plane. To begin trapping, Heimo must find a way to cross a newly frozen river. Ray and his daughters set out to catch much needed meat.

programme.title: Movie: The Hitman's Bodyguard
programme.desc: A notorious hitman who is set to testify against a ruthless dictator becomes targeted by his goons and assassins. In order to stay alive and make it to The Hague he has to team up with the government agent who's been a thorn in his side for years.

programme.title: Movie: Waist Deep
programme.desc: A former convict is placed in a bad situation when his son is kidnapped in a carjacking. Now with a ransom demand of $100,000 he must break the law to rescue his son with the aid of a street-smart hustler.

programme.title: Martin: Really, Gina Is Not My Lover
programme.desc: Gina goes to the dentist and Martin wants to win an award at his high school reunion.

programme.title: Martin: Got to Be There
programme.desc: Martin drives 500 miles to try and catch Gina being unfaithful on a business trip.

programme.title: Martin: Beat It

programme.title: Below Deck: A Recipe for Disaster
programme.desc: The new deckhand arrives just in time as Brian's injured knee worsens. Ashton tries to ingratiate the new teammate with the deck crew, but his efforts are wasted after an explosive crew night out. Kate and Kevin battle over the control of meal service.

programme.title: Below Deck: 12 Seconds in Heaven
programme.desc: Rhylee jeopardizes her job and relationships with the crew after a dramatic first night out. Tanner gossips about his relationship with Simone as things heat up between them. Still sidelined by his leg injury, Brian gets sent to the hospital.

programme.title: Below Deck: Everyone Hates Kate
programme.desc: The crew bonds over a trip to an elephant sanctuary, but Kate's attitude pushes the others to the brink. A day off at the beach club has Courtney protective over Brian. Simone learns Tanner has been gossiping about their relationship.

programme.title: Below Deck: I'm Sorry You Feel That Way
programme.desc: Tanner gives Simone mixed signals by telling her that he just wants to keep things casual, while Ashton tries to squash his beef with Kate after their heated argument the night before. Kate promotes Courtney to second stew.

programme.title: Below Deck: Yacht-pocalypse Now
programme.desc: The crew tries to redeem themselves with returning charter guests after Ashton cancels a beach picnic which throws the entire boat into complete chaos. Rhylee and Ashton continue to butt heads while Tanner and Simone contemplate their relationship.

programme.title: Below Deck: Exodus
programme.desc: The crew including Captain Lee are shocked to wake up and hear the shocking news that Kate quit. In Kate's absence, Simone and Courtney struggle to maintain order in the interior. Ashton doesn't remember his actions from the night before.

programme.title: Below Deck: Witch Hunt
programme.desc: Kevin spirals out in response to charter guest, and professional chef, Justine telling him to 'step it up.' Much to Ashton's dismay, Kate returns and interferes in the deck team's drama. Simone sets out to become a better Second Stew.

programme.title: Below Deck: Public Displays of Affection
programme.desc: Alexis Bellino and her new beau come aboard the Valor to celebrate her recent divorce. After the deck team deals with major issues, Lee comes to a decision about Rhylee's future, forcing Ashton to change his management style.

programme.title: Below Deck: The Scorpion Queen
programme.desc: Tanner and Kate's flirtations become more obvious to the crew which leads Simone to lose all respect for the two when she finds out they've already kissed. Pulling up to the marina, Kate sees the first yacht she ever worked on as a stewardess.

programme.title: Movie: X-Men: Apocalypse
programme.desc: Professor X helps Raven lead a team of young mutants to stop Apocalypse, the first mutant, from destroying the world. Apocalypse has recruited a team of powerful mutants, including Magneto, to help him. The fate of Earth hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Cannons and Klingons
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars fire off to the shooting range to check out an antique signal cannon from the 1980's TV series 'Magnum P. I.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: High Stakes
programme.desc: A percussion pistol from the 1830s pops into the shop. Corey faces a monstrous challenge when a signed copy of Bram Stoker's 'Dracula' creeps through the doors.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chum-p Change
programme.desc: It's a real life shoot-out when the guys compete in an 'old vs. new' rifle shooting competition. A collection of paper money from the Republic of Texas comes into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Zoodoo
programme.desc: An autographed collection of presidential memoirs comes into the shop. A guy brings in a can of Zoo Doo brand elephant manure.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: I Herd That
programme.desc: An 1870s Sharps buffalo rifle; an aphorism signed by Mark Twain; Victorian pickle castors.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Woah Pilgrim
programme.desc: The guys are offered the hat John Wayne wore in 'The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance.' Then, Chumlee checks out a card playing book from 1866. Later, Corey brings his dog to the shop for the day, and the guys try to put her to work.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick the Giant
programme.desc: The shop checks out some posters by artist Shepard Fairey, the artist behind the famous Obama posters. Corey and Chumlee look at the possibility of getting a Mork figurine. Later, Rick and Chum evaluate their friendship.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Can't Buy Me Love
programme.desc: One of the most important documents in the history of rock 'n' roll invades the shop: the original contract between The Beatles and their manager, Brian Epstein. Then, a Cold War-era high altitude suit blasts into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Sword Play
programme.desc: Rick checks out a Willys Wagon from 1951 and a pair of 19th Century European swords.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Crossing Chum
programme.desc: A 1965 Panama Canal service medal is presented to the shop, and Corey sets his sights on a Renaissance era crossbow. Later, Chumlee finds himself in hot water after he fails to call in an expert.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: First Lady of Pawn
programme.desc: Get body slammed with the Pawn Stars when a WWE Hall of Fame ring fights for the title. Corey gets scrappy when he checks out a 1927 Essex Sedan rat rod. Martha Washington brings home the bacon when an 1891 $1 silver certificate circulates into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Brothers
programme.desc: 1894 S Barber Dime, a John Belushi autograph, a 1950s Jim Henson puppet pops in, and a 1965 Schwinn bicycle.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawntucky Derby
programme.desc: A 1980s Sigma Derby horse-racing game, a 1940s Moby Dick Classic Comic, a dollar signed by Walt Disney and Ronald Reagan, and a 1910 envelope sealer.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Four Score and Seven Pawns
programme.desc: An 1800s Colt revolver barrels into the shop, and an antique Chinese fingernail guard scratches in. Later, a screen-used Playboy magazine from 'Forrest Gump' reveals itself.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: My Country, Pawn of Thee
programme.desc: Handwritten lyrics to 'My Country, Tis of Thee'; a WWII era Linemar Space Explorer Toy; a United Nations Helmet from Somalia; a giant bell from the classic El Rancho Hotel and Casino.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: By Land or By Seep
programme.desc: Rick thinks about taking a big risk and removing six Picasso etchings from a renowned illustrated edition of 'Lysistrata.' Chumlee checks out some vintage ThunderCats toys from the 1980s. Rick and Corey debate about bringing an amphibious jeep off land.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Thar She Pawns
programme.desc: Rick goes to check out a 1974 Triumph Convertible. Two whale spears find their way into the shop. Chum reminisces over a pair of Popeye water pistols.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Balloon Payments
programme.desc: Rick may cross the line when he calls in a surprise expert for an appraisal on a Ronald McDonald balloon inflator. Chum pursues an antique RCA inkwell, while Corey sets his sights on a vintage spear.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Great Scott!
programme.desc: Rick receives an offer on a 1973 Marshall amp, with all of the original parts intact. A hoverboard signed by the cast of the 'Back to the Future' sequel floats into the shop towards Corey and Chumlee.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Samurai
programme.desc: Three Japanese samurai swords have Chum trying to cut a great deal. Corey pursues a Steiff donkey pull toy, while Rick looks over a British WWII propaganda poster and some significant thank-you letters.

programme.desc: When a ghostly figure is caught on tape stalking people in Japan, some fear its hard evidence of a horrifying local legend.

programme.desc: When a shark is eaten by a mysterious predator, experts wonder if a prehistoric monster is to blame. A sinister sight is caught on tape near Russia's Area 51, and the evidence might point to a cover-up.

programme.desc: When a ghostly figure is caught on tape stalking people in Japan, some fear its hard evidence of a horrifying local legend.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Mayan Treasure
programme.desc: An explorer searching for treasure at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by a mysterious underwater fog. Thousands of fish spontaneously jump to their deaths. Something alien appears over the skies of Lost Angeles.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Beast That Ate Jaws
programme.desc: When a shark is eaten by a mysterious predator, experts wonder if a prehistoric monster is to blame. A sinister sight is caught on tape near Russia's Area 51, and the evidence might point to a cover-up.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Omen of Blood River
programme.desc: When a river of blood washes through a city's streets, some witnesses believe it's a warning of doomsday. A strange perfect circle emerges in the clouds about California, and some experts speculate that it's evidence of alien activity.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Curse of the Catacombs
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth containing thousands of human skeletons is a dark mystery beneath the streets of Rome, and now, experts are using cutting-edge tech to reveal what killed them and why they were buried in this eerie place.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Animal Mummies: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: Ancient Egypt's animal mummies are one of antiquity's darkest mysteries, and today, innovative new imaging technology reveals what's inside these strange relics. The shocking truth challenges everything we know about worship in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Legend of the Nazca Lines
programme.desc: The Nazca Lines are the mysterious wonders of a long-gone civilization, and today, experts are using cutting-edge technology to investigate the secrets of the mummies and treasures found in these bizarre ruins to finally reveal their true purpose.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Search for Nefertiti's Mummy
programme.desc: New technology might help experts track down Nefertiti's missing mummy, an investigation that could reveal new secrets about one of ancient Egypt's most powerful women.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Atlantis: The New Treasures
programme.desc: After experts discover an ancient lost city off the coast of Egypt, the race to unearth its priceless relics and bring this mysterious sunken world back to life begins, revealing the doomsday event that caused it to sink into the sea.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic
programme.desc: A strange, alien artifact discovered in the ruins of an ancient Greek shipwreck holds the secrets of a technology thousands of years ahead of its time. Now experts are using cutting-edge science to reveal what this mysterious device was used for.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Lost City of the Sun Cult
programme.desc: When experts unearth a mysterious lost city built by an infamous pharaoh, they find clues of a grisly catastrophe. New discoveries reveal the apocalyptic events that turned this place into hell on earth, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Tomb Raiders
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the secrets of Egypt's tomb raiders, and what ancient Egyptians did to ensure the treasures of their dead pharaohs wouldn't be stolen. The latest science answers these great mysteries, shedding new light on Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Crocodile Queen
programme.desc: The Crocodile Queen was Egypt's first female pharaoh, but we don't who she was, or why she took this sinister alter-ego. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Cannibal Crypt
programme.desc: Mysterious tomb carvings provide dark evidence that ancient Egyptians practiced cannibalism, but we don't know why. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Scorpion King
programme.desc: New evidence suggests that the mythological Scorpion King might have actually existed. New discoveries might answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Hunting Ground
programme.desc: Nicole White is in the middle of a bitter custody battle when she vanishes. Suspicion falls on an online date until her husband turns up unexpectedly with his face scratched.

programme.title: Web of Lies: In Dark Corners
programme.desc: Vulnerable mother of five Laura Simonson seeks comfort in the online world of sexual bondage. Lured by a mysterious user named 'Mr. Handcuffs,' Laura doesn't know that she's walking straight into his twisted trap.

programme.title: Web of Lies: New Year's Retribution
programme.desc: A newly single 33-year-old bursting with confidence after losing 200 pounds spends her time flirting with men online. When she fails to turn up for work one day, her friends worry that she didn't just run away with Mr. Right.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother Made History
programme.desc: As a boy, Travis Spencer always told himself that the cruel pranks his older brother, Timothy, played on him were ultimately harmless. He never suspected that his brother was using him to practice methods of torture that would be used on others.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Love For My Boy Is Unchanged
programme.desc: A more intimate interview with the Keller family surfaces new information. They never suspected the man terrorizing their city could be one of their own. As the Kellers realize their son hides a sinister secret, they must decide whether to turn him in.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Dug a Hole and Said a Prayer
programme.desc: When police question a man in the disappearance of his pregnant ex-girlfriend and her young son, they discover he has a terrifying capacity for violence.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Said There Were More of Them
programme.desc: It never occurred to Shirley Gaskins that the father she adored could be one of the most prolific serial killers out there, but, as more people vanished without explanation, she was finding it harder to deny.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Love For My Boy Is Unchanged
programme.desc: A more intimate interview with the Keller family surfaces new information. They never suspected the man terrorizing their city could be one of their own. As the Kellers realize their son hides a sinister secret, they must decide whether to turn him in.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Dug a Hole and Said a Prayer
programme.desc: When police question a man in the disappearance of his pregnant ex-girlfriend and her young son, they discover he has a terrifying capacity for violence.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Was a Good Man to Me
programme.desc: When Alvin "Bud" Brown was arrested he told an officer that he was just like Hannibal Lecter. But, to his wife, Jackie, the man she shared a bed with for years appeared to be gentle and loving until the Thanksgiving Day when she discovered the truth.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Wished My Son Were Dead
programme.desc: It has been more than 25 years, yet Joyce Alexander is still terrified of her son, William Patrick Alexander. She fears he holds her responsible for his horrifying crime, and is convinced he is plotting his revenge from prison.

programme.title: Home Alone: Inheriting Evil
programme.desc: CeCe Coffee is a Southern Belle with a beautiful home but very little home security. In a bizarre case of mistaken identity, she falls prey to a brutal home invasion that will force her to think on her feet if she wants to stay alive.

programme.title: Home Alone: Banking on Fear
programme.desc: Valerie and Matthew Yussman have their worlds turned upside down when masked intruders break into their home. But this is no normal robbery -- these professional criminals want $1 million and they will use a bomb to ensure they get it.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Ambition to Die For
programme.desc: Dino's long work hours and missing bail jumper make his wife suspicious. Then a hidden secret is revealed.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Lethal Romance
programme.desc: An ambitious Harlem couple dreams of a better life for themselves. Unfortunately they're stuck in a bitter cycle of poverty poor health and mistrust leading one of them to decide to put their dreams to rest, forever.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: My Way or The Dead Way
programme.desc: Jodie is Edgar's secret high school crush. After a chance meeting, the two get together quickly. But money trouble, jealousy and a rebellious stepdaughter are about to turn this second chance at love into the high school reunion from hell.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Sins of the Heart
programme.desc: Young, rich, and religious, John and Nikki Hillrich fall in love at college. It's a match made in heaven- but hell is not far off. When desire collides with faith, secret lives marked by sinful liaisons and menacing new friends shatter their perfect life.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: A Handsome Devil
programme.desc: When a Luzerne County detective follows up on a series of home invasions as a courtesy to a friend and veteran, his investigation brings him face-to-face with a serial sociopath guilty of far more than mere breaking and entering.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Bloodlust
programme.desc: When an officer pulls over a reckless driver in a routine traffic stop, he unlocks the key to a series of murders. Investigators from various jurisdictions work in tandem to track a sadistic killer with a penchant for torture, robbery, and bloodlust.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Death Wish
programme.desc: A park ranger in Texas pulls over a suspicious truck filled with marijuana. The passenger flees deep into the desert, unleashing a manhunt that will unearth something far more sinister--and bizarre--than detectives could ever have imagined.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Home Sweet Hell
programme.desc: A suspicious gun store robbery in Maryland piques the interest of the ATF, and ignites an investigation into violence, arson, and murder. As detectives zero in on the suspect, they find themselves face-to-face with an unlikely killer.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Night of the Machete
programme.desc: Two young couples in an Idaho apartment building walk on eggshells around a neighbor who can't stand the one couple's music and the other's dog. Tensions keep rising between all parties until finally hell breaks loose and a violent rampage erupts.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: Two neighbors in New Brighton, Minnesota get along great until one of them catches Lyme Disease from the deer the other feeds on his property. The ensuing blame game, hostility and rising conflict ends in gunfire, death, injury and ruin.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Not in My Yard
programme.desc: A rash of break-ins shatters the peace in a tight community, and when residents take sides along the fault lines; good friends turn into deadly enemies.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.desc: Steve and Stacie just moved to St. Pete Beach, Florida, and are looking to put down some roots. They find their perfect beachside home but it needs a ton of work.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Three's Company on the Gulf Coast
programme.desc: A family searches for a beach retreat in Gulf Shores, AL. While they have different opinions on what type of house they should get, they all agree they want to live near the beach.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Galveston Getaway
programme.desc: This couple is ready to find a beach home of their own after years of visiting relatives on the sunny shores of Galveston, TX. They find a house with potential but it's in need of serious work.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hidden History
programme.desc: The crew saves an Ohio barn built with incredible craftsmanship and Mark scouts another barn that turns out to be a keeper. Later, he visits a massive timber-frame barn that was perfectly restored on its original site and converted into a restaurant.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Antique barns and cabins are salvaged and the wood reused for stunning modern homes.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Biggest Barn Ever
programme.desc: In Texas, the Barnwood Builders raise the largest timberframe they have ever built by combining wood and steel. Along the way, they battle hundred degree temperatures, and Mark explores a renovated inn with the Junk Gypsies.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Mountaineer Volunteers
programme.desc: Mark donates a timber frame to his alma mater, West Virginia University, as the latest addition to their pioneer heritage center.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach
programme.desc: Jim and Tina have purchased a 1930s beach cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware for their family. The house has a few charming touches, but a lot of aesthetic and structural issues.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Blown-out Beach House
programme.desc: A family with many fond memories of summer vacations in their Lewes, Delaware, beach house finds that their cottage's awkward layout isn't working. The space is maximized by vaulting the ceiling as well as adding an open-concept ground floor.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Pie-shaped Problem House
programme.desc: A couple loves to host family at their home in Dewey Beach, DE, but no one wants to stay in their tiny, awkwardly shaped guest house. With a limited budget, Marnie gets creative and bold with her design choices to transform the house.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Big-Time Brother Rebuild in Rhode Island
programme.desc: Business partner brothers look for a vacation home in Coventry, RI. Their real estate agent finds the perfect lakefront fixer-upper, but the to-do list is long and the brothers quickly run into many structural issues.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Wolf Lake Escape
programme.desc: New parents look to escape their busy New York City lives with a move to Wolf Lake, a small, rustic lake community in upstate New York. The properties they consider require significant renovations and may break the bank.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Second Generation Renovation on Georgia's Lake Arrowhead
programme.desc: Lisa and Angela are co-workers and friends that are searching for a house on Lake Arrowhead in Georgia. With the help of their daughters Danielle and Allie, they're hoping to find the perfect vacation home to share between their two growing families.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Rework in Wisconsin
programme.desc: A couple finds a fixer-upper in Wisconsin that overlooks Lake Michigan and they're doing all the renovation work themselves. He's a contractor with experience renovating properties, and she's ready to join him and get her hands dirty.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Alabama Lakefront Overhaul
programme.desc: A couple with renovation know-how is looking for a fixer-upper lake house near Weiss Lake in Alabama.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Breakfast Bonanza
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tour of tasty treats has convinced him that breakfast is the most important meal of the day, and he's inducting his favorites into the Man v. Food Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most Perfect Pork
programme.desc: Casey's eating odyssey has taken him all over the country and back again, and it's finally time to honour the best of the best. We're counting down the five most perfect pork dishes in Man v. Food history.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hogs and Dogs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe sets sail for The Great Frederick Fair in Maryland, where he goes all in for The Whole Hog, finds his sea legs with The Crabby Dog, rounds out his plate with Cake-a-Dilla and dances for joy with the Hula Boat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Feast and Fries
programme.desc: At the Paris Fair in Ontario, Canada, Noah Cappe ponders a meat pie poutine. At the Washington County Fair in New York he taps into sugar shack cotton candy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Funnel Cakes and Fried Fudge
programme.desc: The York Fair in Pennsylvania has been drawing crowds since 1765, and has had 250 years to perfect its carnival eats! Noah decks the halls with a taste of Christmas, goes off on the burger bomb pretzel, and enjoys a fork free chick 'n' waffle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Clams and Cannoli
programme.desc: Mouthwatering midway munchies are on the menu at the Delaware County Fair in Walton, N.Y., where Noah Cappe goes wild for the spaghizza, packs on the pork with freshman 15 fries, snaps to attention for the veteran's clams n' corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Souperman
programme.desc: Noah Cappe ventures to the land of cheese for the Wisconsin State Fair and is greeted with the ooey-gooey French Onion Soup'r Stick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jackie Hash Brown
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the world-famous Iowa State Fair to sample some award-winning new items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: It's A Wonderful Bite
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to California for some holiday magic at Winter Fest OC, where there are lots of treats for all the good boys and girls.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Postman Always Brings Rice
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe heads to Hawaii for the Maui Fair where rice is always on the menu. He enjoys traditional Hawaiian treats like the Laulau Feast and Loco Moco and cross-cultural favs like Furikake Salmon.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Culinary Revolutions
programme.desc: There's no denying that some foods have revolutionized the culinary game while making stomachs happy. Scott Conant gives new meaning to an old favorite with an updated take on classic potato tots.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: In the Last Place You'd Expect
programme.desc: Sometimes the best dishes are in the last place you'd ever expect to find them. We've scoured the globe, searched far and wide, and the hunt stops here. Alex Guarnaschelli ends the debate over where to find the best bagel -- it's in North Yarmouth, Maine!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Desert Island Dish
programme.desc: Mayday! Mayday! The chefs and foodies are stranded on a desert island with nothing but an appetite, and they're sharing the one dish they simply can't live without.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On Wheels
programme.desc: Ditch the four walls, head outside, and get your fill of those portable powerhouses known as food trucks. Jeff Mauro gets happy about an angry lobster sandwich from the Happy Lobster Truck in Chicago.

programme.title: Patti Labelle's Place: Ta'rhonda Jones And Lance Gross
programme.desc: Patti has star power in her kitchen today. First, Ta'Rhonda Jones drops by to learn Patti's delicious Pork Chops with Sauteed Cabbage. Then, Patti refreshes her palate with actress Kaitlin Doubleday over a vegan lunch.

programme.title: Patti Labelle's Place: Carla Hall and J.R. Smith
programme.desc: It's family time at Patti LaBelle's place, when Patti invites her good friend Carla Hall over for a down-home Southern lunch, inspired by her father's Cornmeal Fried Catfish.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Off to the Races
programme.desc: Bobby's passion for cooking is matched by his love of horse racing. He serves up a brunch menu fit for the Kentucky Derby.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Cuisine du Jour
programme.desc: Bobby whisks us away to the South of France as he cooks up a delicious brunch menu inspired by one of his favorite places. All good French food is accompanied by a Baguette and Bobby toasts his with Goat Cheese.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Siesta Fiesta
programme.desc: Bobby may only have a few Spanish words in his repertoire, but when it comes to Spanish cuisine, he's a true aficionado.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: The Big Easy
programme.desc: Inspired by what he calls one of the greatest food cities in America, Bobby creates a brunch menu that would make New Orleans proud.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Southern, Spicy and Sweet
programme.desc: Bobby Flay makes a surprise guest appearance as Michael visits an over-the-top barbecue joint in New York with a one-of-a-kind brontosaurus beef rib. In Nashville, local tradition is hot chicken, Michael pushes his personal limit.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Whole Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Michael Symon's in Nashville, where a killer new burger joint encourages you to construct your own custom creations. Then, he hits the heart of Cleveland where a newcomer pushes the boundaries of pub food and house-made brews.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Finger-Licking Good
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli joins Michael Symon at one of his favorite Manhattan spots, where they combine a bottomless beer selection with the most high-octane hot dog known to man.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Smokey
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, where a place he went as a kid combines several classic sweets to make a one-of-a-kind dessert burger.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mocktail
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes loco for Sunshine State snacks at the Manatee County Fair in Palmetto, Fla. There's lots of ooey-gooey goodness in the pizza supremo burger and the ulti-melt burger, but it's the sandia loca that has Noah flipping out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Garlic's Angels
programme.desc: Noah Cappe packs his breath mints and heads to the South Florida Garlic Festival in Delray Beach, Fla., where the stinking rose makes an appearance in fair foods like the claw cake burger and mojo pork pockets.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dates on a Plane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the California desert for a date with deliciousness at the Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival. He tries spicy treats like the fire fingers kartwheel and the sonoran fire dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mad Snacks: Berry Road
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels back in time at the Texas Renaissance Festival, where the medieval-inspired meals range from the Sir Francis fry dog to the crown jewel. Then it's over to Plant City, Fla., where Noah chows down on some berry delicious carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Requiem For An Ice Cream
programme.desc: Noah Cappe rolls into Alabama for some country carnival cookin' at the Greater Gulf State Fair in Mobile. He digs into the dirty bird turkey leg and takes a ride on a crazy midway mashup.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Eggs Men
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets the royal treatment with "ye olde eats" at the Hoggetown Medieval Faire in Gainesville, Fla. Meat is all over the menu, and Noah goes wild for the smoked bison burger and the wild boar leg.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet of the Dates
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is ready for 1,001 nights of fun at the Arabian Nights-themed Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival in Indio, Calif. He makes a date with a dangerous burger and enjoys a sweet mashup with the churro dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There Will Be Bacon
programme.desc: Noah Cappe pigs out at the Bacon and Bourbon Fest in Wellington, Fla., where all-American classics make an appearance in the stuffed crust bacon-za, but it's the peanut butter pork donuts that hit the sweet and salty spot.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Vietnam in HD: A Changing War (1969-1970)

programme.title: Patton: A Genius for War

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: I Know Why the Caged Bird Screams
programme.desc: Will and Jazz steal a statue from a rival school, who in turn kidnaps Carlton.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: When You Hit Upon a Star
programme.desc: Will's love affair with a musician is threatened when she meets her handsome ex-lover.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Stop Will! In the Name of Love
programme.desc: Ashley rebels against Will's overprotectiveness when he chaperones her on a date.

programme.title: Living Single: They've Gotta Have It
programme.desc: Max and Regine take a seminar to decrease their dependency on men.

programme.title: Living Single: Working Nine to Nine-Fifteen
programme.desc: Max gets her old job back, then quits; Overton and Regine think a neighbour is a killer.

programme.title: Living Single: Bristle While You Work
programme.desc: Khadijah and Regine clash while working on an ad campaign.

programme.title: Living Single: School Daze
programme.desc: Overton joins Synclaire's art history class.

programme.title: Movie: Brown Sugar
programme.desc: A magazine editor and a hip-hop record executive find romance blossoming between them when they find new loves of their own.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Romance and Chocolate
programme.desc: A Manhattan chocolatier heads to Belgium with plans to close up her family's chocolate shop, but gets swept up in a competition to become the Belgian Royal family's chocolatier. The potential for love might be the only thing to shake her focus.

programme.title: Movie: From Friend to Fiancé
programme.desc: A quirky girl in her early 30's has it all, except the perfect man. Her childhood BFF wants her to be the best "man" at his wedding, but after spending time together planning his wedding to her former rival, she realizes he is the one she wants.

programme.title: Movie: Matching Hearts
programme.desc: As Valentine's Day nears, a matchmaker is tasked by her mentor to find a match for an entrepreneur who believes staying single is the key to success.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nice and Easy
programme.desc: Blanche's visiting niece is a chip right off the old block when she dates a different man all night every night. Dorothy does battle with a mouse living in the house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Operation
programme.desc: Dorothy is hesitant about having foot surgery just as she was scheduled to tap dance with Blanche and Rose at a dance recital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood
programme.desc: Blanche is romanced by a wealthy suitor who she learns has several small children. This fact dampens his proposal of marriage. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Rose go to bat with the bathroom plumbing.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Adult Education
programme.desc: Blanche's psychology professor sexually harasses her when she goes to him for help on a difficult test. Blanche's professor makes her a harassing deal: If she has sex with him, he'll give her an 'A' for the exam.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Job Hunting
programme.desc: When Rose loses her job at the grief center, she begins searching for other sources of work. Meanwhile, Blanche tries to lose a few pounds and Dorothy is excited when a man she once had a crush on asks her out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blind Ambitions
programme.desc: Rose's sister, Lily, can't accept the fact that now that she's blind, she needs help.

programme.title: Frasier: The Crucible
programme.desc: Frasier throws a dinner party to showcase his new painting, only to have the artist declare it a forgery. His attempt at retribution is foiled by a frightened Niles.

programme.title: Frasier: Call Me Irresponsible
programme.desc: After advising a caller to break up with his girlfriend, Frasier begins dating her.

programme.title: Frasier: Beloved Infidel
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier suspect Martin may have had an affair during their childhood.

programme.title: Frasier: Selling Out
programme.desc: Frasier learns how much he could earn from personal endorsements and he starts doing ads.

programme.title: Frasier: Oops
programme.desc: Bulldog quits after hearing a rumour that he is about to be fired from the station.

programme.title: Frasier: Death Becomes Him
programme.desc: Frasier becomes obsessed with his own mortality when a man his age suddenly drops dead. He sets out to determine how the man could have died so young.

programme.title: Frasier: Miracle on Third or Fourth Street
programme.desc: Frasier agrees to work Christmas Day and searches desperately for a heart-warming story.

programme.title: Frasier: Guess Who's Coming to Breakfast
programme.desc: Frasier must make amends after discussing Martin's romantic date on his radio show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Meets Charles Boyer
programme.desc: Lucy creates a hoax to convince Ricky that his jealousy of her crush on an actor is silly.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Gets a Paris Gown
programme.desc: Lucy prevails upon Ricky to let her attend a Paris couturier's showing.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy in the Swiss Alps
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes become snowbound in the Swiss Alps when they go climbing.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Gets Homesick in Italy
programme.desc: Tomorrow is little Ricky's birthday and Lucy wants to make a Transatlantic phone call.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy
programme.desc: Blanche's father, Big Daddy, comes to Miami for a visit, with an announcement; he's sold the family plantation and is setting out to become a country singer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Way We Met
programme.desc: One night after watching 'Psycho', the girls find it hard to sleep so they stay up and reminisce about how they all came to live with one another.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: End of the Curse
programme.desc: Blanche is mortified after taking a pregnancy test which indicates she's pregnant. Then after visiting her doctor, she learns the truth, she's beginning menopause.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ladies of the Evening
programme.desc: The house is fumigated and the girls move into a Miami Beach hotel. Previously, Blanche had won three tickets to see the opening of Burt Reynolds new movie and passes to the party held afterwards where they could meet him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Take Him, He's Mine
programme.desc: Dorothy dumps a depressed Stan on Blanche so that she can go out with a naval officer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: It's a Miserable Life
programme.desc: The girls petition to save an old oak tree on the property of a hateful woman.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Sit down with actress Rosalind Chao from 'Mulan.' Chadwick Boyd is in our kitchen making a skillet shrimp dinner.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Guests include Hallmark star Candace Cameron Bure and actress Skyler Shaye from the Hallmark Movies & Mysteries movie 'JL Family Ranch: The Wedding Gift.'

programme.title: Movie: My Favorite Bachelor
programme.desc: A shy writer has to go out on a date with a different man every month in order to write an article for her company's 'Man for Every Month' blog.

programme.title: Movie: The Secret Ingredient
programme.desc: A small-town baker is surprised with an invite to compete in a baking show. While there, she runs into her ex-fiancé.

programme.title: South Park: Fat Butt and Pancake Head
programme.desc: One of Cartman's body parts becomes famous overnight and rivals the popularity of another superstar.

programme.title: The Office: Back From Vacation
programme.desc: Still in vacation mode after his trip to Jamaica, Michael tries to hang on to his relaxed island vibe despite a wave of office hassles. It all becomes too much when an e-mail containing a racy vacation photo is forwarded around the office.

programme.title: The Office: Traveling Salesmen
programme.desc: On Andy's suggestion, Michael has staffers team up for sales calls, leading to some interesting, insightful moments in the field. Meanwhile, Dwight attempts to cover for Angela after she misses an important deadline.

programme.title: The Office: The Return
programme.desc: Oscar returns from his vacation with mixed emotions on whether or not he wants to be a part of the office. Meanwhile, Andy takes advantage of recent events to get closer to Michael. Jim turns to Karen and Pam for help to stage a prank on a new target.

programme.title: The Office: Ben Franklin
programme.desc: Acting on bad advice he received from his friend Todd Packer, Michael brings two 'adult' performers into the office in honour of Phyllis's wedding shower. Meanwhile, Karen confronts Pam about her past with Jim.

programme.title: The Office: Phyllis' Wedding
programme.desc: Phyllis regrets giving Michael an important job at her wedding after several embarrassing moments. Pam has flashbacks of her own wedding planning when she sees Phyllis's decorations. Meanwhile, Dwight is determined to catch wedding crashers.

programme.title: The Office: Business School
programme.desc: Ryan invites Michael to be a guest speaker at his business school. Meanwhile, Dwight battles a bat that gets loose in the office while Pam invites co-workers to her first art show.

programme.title: The Office: Cocktails
programme.desc: Michael and Jan go public with their relationship during a party at their CFO's home. At the party, Jim meets Karen's ex. Meanwhile, the rest of the office decides to go to happy hour for drinks.

programme.title: The Office: The Negotiation
programme.desc: Darryl decides to meet with Michael to negotiate a pay increase. Meanwhile, Jim deals with the consequences of Pam's confession to Roy.

programme.title: The Office: Safety Training
programme.desc: Andy returns to the office after several weeks of anger management training, determined to make a fresh start with all the Dunder Mifflin employees. On safety training day, Michael and Dwight try to illuminate the true dangers of the workplace.

programme.title: The Office: Product Recall
programme.desc: The office is in crisis mode after a large shipment of Dunder-Mifflin paper is accidentally sent out with an obscene watermark. In an effort to manage the media, Michael holds an impromptu press conference.

programme.title: The Office: Women's Appreciation
programme.desc: After Phyllis gets flashed in the parking lot, Dwight sets out to improve on-site security. Michael uses the situation as a pretence to bond with the female employees at the mall and to get advice on how to break up with Jan.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: September 21, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: The Office: Beach Games
programme.desc: Michael is being considered for a job at corporate and has to recommend his replacement.

programme.title: South Park: Grey Dawn
programme.desc: With South Park's senior citizens behind the wheel, more than a few farmer's markets have been mowed down. Unwilling to surrender their driver's licenses, the elderly fight back.

programme.title: South Park: Le Petit Tourette
programme.desc: Cartman discovers the joys of having Tourette's syndrome. Drunk with the power of saying whatever he wants without getting in trouble for it, he lines up National TV Coverage to take advantage of his new life with no filters.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: September 21, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: About Last Night...
